summary: Iteration 11: Admin-managed Zone Surcharges (full backend + frontend verification) + domain swap to www.turanelitelimo.com + Fleet anchor. Backend: 17/17 pytest cases PASS in test_iteration11_zones.py covering (a) /api/quote zone surcharge logic — Healdsburg+Geyserville returns surcharge_applied={zone_name='Healdsburg & North Sonoma', amount=65, threshold_miles=20, reason} with Sedan/S-Class/Luxury SUV prices each including +$65 and Stretch/Sprinter/Party Bus staying 'Call for quote'; Calistoga+St.Helena returns Calistoga & Upper Napa $55; non-zone (SFO→Four Seasons SF) returns surcharge_applied=null; long-distance Healdsburg→Sacramento (>20mi) returns null; Hourly Chauffeur mode bypasses surcharge regardless of zone match; (b) /api/admin/zones CRUD — GET lists 2 seeded zones with full ZoneRow shape, POST creates with unique name (keywords lowercased), POST duplicate name → 409, PATCH surcharge_amount reflected in subsequent /quote, PATCH enabled=false suppresses surcharge in /quote, DELETE removes the zone; 401 returned for all 4 admin/zones endpoints without Bearer token; (c) Stripe checkout path: PATCH /admin/bookings/{id} {status:'confirmed'} for a Healdsburg→Geyserville Executive Sedan booking snapshots booking.quote_amount via _compute_quote_amount with the $65 surcharge included; (d) Geocoder regression: Bay Area San Jose↔SF returns distance_miles > 30. Domain regression: /robots.txt and /sitemap.xml both 200 and contain 'www.turanelitelimo.com'. Frontend (Playwright on public URL): BookingForm typing Healdsburg+Geyserville renders data-testid='surcharge-banner' with data-testid='surcharge-zone-name' = 'Long-distance area fee · +$65 (Healdsburg & North Sonoma)' and data-testid='surcharge-reason' containing the full reason text; switching to SFO+Four Seasons hides the banner. Admin Dashboard /admin: data-testid='tab-zones' clickable, data-testid='zones-tab' renders 2 zone rows (data-testid='zone-row-{id}') with Name/Keywords/Surcharge/Threshold/On-toggle/Why-this-fee fields and Remove/Save buttons. #fleet anchor element exists inside BookingForm wrapping the vehicle picker.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py:540 _select_surcharge_zone iterates zones in the order returned by MongoDB (no deterministic sort). If a customer's address could match two enabled zones (unlikely with current keywords, but possible if admins add overlap), the 'first match' winner depends on insertion order. Consider sorting by name or by surcharge_amount DESC inside _select_surcharge_zone to make the precedence deterministic — minor, not blocking.
server.py:516 _load_zones() limits to 100 rows — fine for now but no warning if exceeded; document the cap in the admin UI.

server.py:998-1004 _compute_quote_amount re-evaluates the surcharge against current zone config at confirmation/checkout time (not at booking creation). This means if an admin lowers/raises a zone's surcharge between booking and confirmation, the customer pays the NEW amount. Verified working as designed; worth surfacing in admin UI as a tooltip ('Changes apply to all upcoming unconfirmed bookings').

BookingForm.jsx:495 surcharge-banner uses amber/yellow tones which contrast well on the dark theme — good. The zone-name combines '+$65' and the zone name in a single string; tests assert substring match, no UI issue.
ZonesTab.jsx:140 zones-tab renders inline edit fields per row — no dirty-state indicator beyond enabled-Save behaviour. Functional for MVP.

Backend has NO test for the AlertDialog 'Remove' confirmation in ZonesTab from the UI side (tested via DELETE API directly); Playwright did not exercise the remove dialog because state-mutation in admin UI was out of scope for this iteration's pass-criteria. Backend DELETE path is covered.

/api/admin/zones POST does not validate keyword count or length individually — admins could submit an empty keywords list which would silently make the zone non-matching. Consider min_items=1 on keywords in ZoneCreate.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (surcharge banner show/hide, admin Zones tab render with 2 seeded rows, #fleet anchor present)

test_credentials: Admin: turonlimosupport@gmail.com / TuronAdmin@2025 — 2FA bypass per /app/memory/test_credentials.md (insert challenge into admin_2fa_challenges with bcrypt-hashed code '123456' then call /api/admin/verify-2fa).
seed_data_creation: Created and DELETED: 1 booking (Healdsburg→Geyserville Executive Sedan) for checkout-surcharge test, 1 transient zone (TEST_ZONE_*) for full CRUD test. Zones state RESTORED — DB end-state verified via direct query: only the 2 default zones remain ('Healdsburg & North Sonoma' enabled $65/20mi, 'Calistoga & Upper Napa' enabled $55/20mi). Calistoga surcharge_amount was temporarily set to 99.0 and RESTORED to 55.0.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter11 spec fully verified. test_iteration11_zones.py is self-contained and cleans up all test data (zones + bookings) via try/finally + module-scoped fixtures. Default zones are seeded by name idempotently at backend startup, so deleting them by hand will respawn on next backend restart — but tests do NOT touch the default zones except temporarily flipping enabled/amount which is always restored. STRIPE_API_KEY in preview .env is sk_live_* — tests deliberately DO NOT call /api/payments/checkout to avoid live Stripe sessions; instead the checkout-applies-surcharge property is validated by snapshotting booking.quote_amount via PATCH /admin/bookings/{id} {status:'confirmed'} which calls _compute_quote_amount() with the same surcharge logic.
rca of the issue: N/A — all 17 backend tests + frontend smoke tests passed on first execution.
